expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Case focus (must be explicitly covered)”: “Missing scenario generation for: 1) template-save 2) report-builder loading”. It then explicitly covers both with sections “A) Template-save...” and “B) Report-builder loading...”, plus “Minimal scenario coverage...” entries for each.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md repeatedly anchors to Phase 4a and its contract: “Primary phase: Phase 4a (subcategory-only scenario draft generation)” and “Per the Phase 4a contract, Phase 4a must produce a subcategory-first draft with: scenario chains... observable verification leaves... no top-layer canonical categories”. The provided “Minimal scenario coverage...” is written in a subcategory-first style and calls out required scenario chains and observable verification leaves, consistent with phase4a.
